summary: WM Finance Iteration 5 - Final testing completed. All P0/P1 features working correctly: Analytics pages (Balance, Expenses, Profitability), Top Contractors widget, Auto Rules page, Document linking, AI Chat, and Hotkeys (N, D). Backend 100% pass rate (10/10 tests). Frontend 100% pass rate - all features functional.

issues: Console warnings: 'The width(-1) and height(-1) of chart should be greater than 0' - Recharts library sizing issue during initial render (cosmetic only)

passed_tests: Backend: /api/analytics/expense-analysis - Returns expense data with categories, directions, contractors, daily trend
Backend: /api/analytics/profitability - Returns profitability by business directions with margins
Backend: /api/ai/chat - AI assistant responds with contextual financial data
Frontend: /analytics/balance - Shows Assets, Liabilities, Receivables, Net Worth cards with proper styling
Frontend: /analytics/expenses - Shows Total Expense, Daily Average, Transaction Count, Top Category with charts
Frontend: /analytics/profitability - Shows Income, Expense, Profit, Margin with direction breakdown charts
Frontend: /settings/rules - Auto rules page with add/edit/delete functionality working
Frontend: Dashboard - Top Contractors widget present
Frontend: Transactions - Document linking via dropdown menu ('Документы') working
Frontend: AI Chat button opens side panel successfully
Frontend: AI Chat responds with accurate financial context (accounts, balances)
critical_code_review_comments: Minor: Add minWidth/minHeight to ResponsiveContainer components to suppress Recharts console warnings
Minor: DialogContent accessibility - consider adding aria-describedby or VisuallyHidden description
seed_data_creation: Test transaction created (150 PLN expense) and auto-rule (TEST_PATTERN_UI) during UI testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: All P0/P1 features from iteration 5 are working. Analytics pages (/analytics/balance, /analytics/expenses, /analytics/profitability) display correctly. Auto Rules page at /settings/rules with full CRUD. AI Chat button at bottom-right opens panel and AI responds with accurate financial context. Hotkeys N and D work for navigation. Previous AI Chat button overlay issue has been resolved.

top_contractors_widget.note: Widget shows 'Топ контрагентов' with data when contractors exist

ai_chat.note: AI responds with accurate account balances and financial context
